description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and featuring a detached garage or shed structure in the backyard. The exterior walls are primarily red brick with some sections in white or light gray, and the roof is a mix of flat and slightly sloped surfaces, with one section covered in dark shingles. The front facade includes a main entrance door, several windows, and a small set of steps leading up to the entry. The backyard is enclosed and contains a paved area, with some outdoor furniture and garden elements visible. The interior layout is open, with multiple rooms visible through the cutaway, including bedrooms, a kitchen, and living spaces. The overall design is practical and typical of mid-20th-century suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a fenced yard, detached garage, and multiple windows and doors, featuring a practical suburban layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, steps, several windows, and part of the fenced yard with outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, detached garage, and the open layout of interior rooms.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the rear facade, fenced perimeter, and the garage structure with visible roof details.
description_view_3: Side view showing the length of the bungalow, side windows, and the arrangement of the backyard and fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
